title: Neuromarketing Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Neuromarketing Master Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall Semester Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Sunday

Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type: VERBAL (SÖZEL)

NO SCIENCE EXAM WILL BE TAKEN FOR THE THESIS/NON-THESIS NEUROMARKETING MASTER'S PROGRAM AT 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER STUDENTS ACCEPTANCE.

For the candidates to apply to the program with thesis, they must have taken the ALES exam and received at least 55 points from the VERBAL (SÖZEL) score type.

Students who will be accepted to the program in the program with thesis will be selected as a result of the calculation to be made by taking 65% of the VERBAL (SÖZEL) ALES score and 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average converted to the 100-point system.

In the calculation of the non-thesis program score, 50% of the VERBAL (SÖZEL) ALES score and 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average converted to the 100-point system will be taken as a basis.

The system will automatically assign 55 points for applicants who do not have an ALES score or have a score below 55 when applying to the non-thesis program.

Lessons in this program are held in the evening hours on weekdays.
